query:
SELECT fs.id as section_id, fs.name as section_name, fs.sortOrder as section_order,
       ff.id as field_id, ff.name as field_name, ff.code, ff.fieldType, ff.isRequired, ff.colSpan, ff.sortOrder as field_order, ff.isActive, ff.dataSource
FROM formSections fs
LEFT JOIN formFields ff ON ff.sectionId = fs.id
WHERE fs.name LIKE '%Basic%' 
  AND fs.typeId IN (SELECT id FROM requestTypes WHERE name LIKE '%TEP%')
ORDER BY fs.sortOrder, ff.sortOrder;
